content.text: Chrome you bolt on, not in. The effect lives on the equipment — always.
Mods are gear conditionals: bolt-on behavior for weapons, armor, foci, and drones. The catalog below is the whole launch list.
Slots: every weapon, armor, and focus has 2 mod slots; heavy mods take 2. Drones have 1.
Install: provider fees by tier, or a Tinkerer at material cost — Signature Work applies (see Tinkerer).
The lane law: mods modify the gear's behavior. Anything that would work bare-handed belongs to an augment, and gets rejected at the door.

content.label: THE SHARED-CAPS LAW
content.text: Mod bonuses share the global stack caps with augments and everything else. A mod may carry at most +1 of any capped currency, conditional only. The caps are the caps, no matter whose ledger the bonus sits on.

rows: Light blade: +1 shell wear per full hit — the grind, sharpened. Flesh untouched.
Dual Swing's Evasion penalty is reduced by 1 for this weapon's contribution (see Dual Wield & Titan Grip).
This weapon's crits also apply Rattled — a beat, pre-spent (see Conditions).
Gun: firing doesn't escalate your node's intel state pre-combat — the mission layer hears nothing.
Gun counts as a knife in Adjacent, and the −2 firing-into-Adjacent penalty doesn't apply (see Weapons).
Your Tag Rounds (see Consumables & Ammo) also count as Painted Targets — Systems-network compatible (see Systems).
Gun: while stationary, ignore light cover's accuracy bonus.
+1 Absorb. Not available on Padded Jacket or Light Weave.
+1 Seal: environment-sourced Charge ticks are reduced by 1 per scene (Charge lives on Charge & Saturation).
When this shell breaks, keep its Evasion cap and 1 Absorb until the end of the next round — the break is a fall, not a cliff.
Once per fight, when a single hit's flesh damage would be 6 or more, reduce it by 2.
Don or doff in one action; field repairs to this armor restore +1.
The first prep-slot item you use each fight costs 0 AP (prep slots — see Systems).

content.text: A focus is Channeler hardware — banked rounds, patterns, and venting live on the casting pages (see Weave & Fire, Patterns, and Charge & Saturation).

rows: End-of-encounter free vent +1. All vent bonuses cap at +2 total, shared with Grounding Mesh.
Bootleg patterns weave without the +1 DC — but your misfire window opens at Charge 6+. Cheap spells, hot hands.

content.text: The electronic-warfare kit is consumable gear, and it lives here with the rest of the catalog.

rows: Thrown, contested vs a chrome target: −1 RP this round.
Cluster: chrome-sighted enemies take −1 accuracy until your next turn.
Enables Hacking contests vs chrome at Medium — Trigger Lock-class effects per charge.
Cluster: attacks into or out of the zone take −1 accuracy. Concealment is a modifier, never hiddenness (see Bands & Movement).
Opens a sealed route between adjacent nodes or through cover — the map-editing item.
Your position can't be ambushed: no ambush round against you while it burns.

content.text: Drones carry 1 mod slot. Drones themselves live on Systems.

rows: Your Calls (see Influence) can be issued from the drone's position.

content.label: PARKED
content.text: Vehicle customization mods — compartments, freezers, fuel, sealing — are parked pending the vehicle module. Nothing on this page installs into a vehicle.
Aftermarket modification voids no warranty, because nothing on this list carries one. Certified installation is available wherever you see our logo, and deniable installation wherever you don't.
